g.text: 3D Data Quality Framework -- Approval Workflow & Governance

Channels: Email + Jira ticket
 Email: approval request / outcome
 Jira: auto-created approval ticket
 assigned to PO / Tech Lead
No approval required -- you are the owner
Track status in DQ Chatbot App
Revise in DQ Chatbot App and resubmit
Edit your rule in DQ Chatbot App
Automated SLA enforcement (runs daily via Rule Maintenance Job):
+48 hrs -> Escalate to Tech Lead + DataOps
